fields.name: ogTitle
fields.label: Open Graph Title
fields.description: Optional social-title override; falls back to the page title

fields.name: ogDescription
fields.label: Open Graph Description
fields.description: Optional social-description override; falls back to the page description

fields.name: nav
fields.label: Navigation Override
fields.description: Optional same-site nav page; the current language root is used by default

fields.name: footer
fields.label: Footer Override
fields.description: Optional same-site footer page; the current language root is used by default

fields.name: language
fields.label: Language Override
fields.description: Optional BCP 47 language tag; normally inferred from the URL

fields.name: direction
fields.label: Text Direction Override
fields.description: Optional; normally inferred from the language
